title: Youtube Poop: If King K.Rool was in Super Smash Bros. Brawl
description:
Apparently, his hatred of news, calls, and tyranny before tomorrow and his refusal to give Donkey Kong the banana cream pie back prevented K.Rool from being a playable character in Brawl. 

I was disappointed that the Brawl announcer didn't shout "SUPA SMAAAAAAASH BRUTHAAAAAAAS BRAAAAAAAAWWWWWL" at the intro of the game, so I'm forced to use Reggie's lies from E3 2007 if I want someone to say "Smash Bros. Brawl". 

Video/Audio Used: 

Donkey Kong Country (SNES) 
Chacarron Macarron 
Spongebob Squarepants 
Donkey Kong Country (TV show)
E3 2007 Nintendo Press Conference 
Super Smash Bros. Brawl 
Donkey Kong 64 

I made a sequel and it's better than this video. 
http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tuYt9usG70g
